title: ‘Google will win the AI race’: Elon Musk makes rare admission, claims Grok will win in space
summary: Elon Musk acknowledges that Google will win the AI race in the US, while China will dominate globally and SpaceX will lead in space. His comments follow a discussion on the limitations of Google's Gemini 3.0 AI model.

title: Realme P4 Lite 5G with 6.8-inch 144Hz display and 7,000mAh battery launched in India, price starts at ₹12,999
summary: Realme has launched the P4 Lite 5G, featuring a 7,000mAh battery, 144Hz display, and a 13MP rear camera. Priced starting at ₹12,999, it offers military-grade durability and a 6nm MediaTek processor. Sales begin on March 25 via Flipkart and other outlets.&nbsp;

title: Meta shuts down Horizon Worlds in VR to focus on a mobile-only app: here's what you need to know
summary: Meta is shutting down the virtual reality version of Horizon Worlds, transitioning it to a mobile-only experience. The VR platform will be removed from the Quest store by March 31, with app removal from VR by June 15, 2026.

title: 'iPhone is not going away': Tim Cook shuts down rumors of AI hardware replacing Apple's flagship
summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook assured that the iPhone will remain central to the company's strategy despite advancements in AI and augmented reality. Cook also talked about what the next 50 years of Apple could look like.

title: Update your iPhone now: Apple warns users as Google uncovers Russian-linked ‘DarkSword’ spyware threat
summary: Apple has urged iPhone users to update their devices after a report revealed Russian-linked actors exploiting vulnerabilities in older iOS versions. The DarkSword exploit allows complete control over affected devices.

title: Meta AI agent goes rogue, leaks sensitive company and user data in major internal security breach: Report
summary: A rogue Meta AI agent exposed certain data to unauthorized employees after responding to a technical query without permission, as per a latest report. The incident is said to have lasted two hours and was classified as 'Sev 1' severity by the company.
